summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ArtSync artist messaging platform. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI loads correctly with proper styling and navigation. Core features including user authentication, artist discovery, messaging, and dashboard functionality are working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Theme toggle button not easily identifiable or accessible

integration_issues.issue: Message button on artist profile may not redirect properly to chat

issues: Purple accent color provides good contrast

passed_tests: Home page hero section and navigation
Discover page artist grid and search
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Make theme toggle more accessible/visible in navbar, 2) Ensure message button on artist profile properly redirects to chat conversation. All core functionality is working well.
